svg.title: 2020 Presidential Margin by County
svg.desc: Biden margin minus Trump margin, shown to set the federal-partisan floor under the race. County boundaries from public U.S. county GeoJSON; issue scores are modelled for a New Campaign Trail scenario.
svg.text: Biden margin minus Trump margin, shown to set the federal-partisan floor under the race.
